## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on agentic rollover progress and align on new client pipeline workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Agentic Rollover Nearing Completion:** The project is nearly finished, with only 1 "To Do" ticket remaining. The "Town" ticket is being removed, and "Interwell" is backlogged, clearing the path to close the project.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**New Client Pipeline Workflow:** To accelerate onboarding, new clients will receive a duplicated agentic pipeline. Kirkland will perform a quick sanity check on the artifacts to ensure quality before delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Internal Project Prioritization:** Client work is the top priority. Internal projects (e.g., website dev, new framework migration) will only be tackled with surplus bandwidth after all client commitments are met.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Loadable Pipeline Innovation:** Nico's pipeline generates product specs from articles, enabling automated creation of hundreds of templates. A proposed GitHub Actions integration would also provide a scalable publishing model for clients without a CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

## Topics

### Agentic Rollover Status

  - [The project is nearing completion, with the following status:](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [In Progress: 4](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [In Review: 3](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [To Do: 1](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Backlog: 4](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Blocked Tickets:**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Town:** Being removed from the project.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Interwell:** Moved to the general backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
          - [**Rationale:** The client is paused pending a site mapping fix. The ticket, created Oct 16, is still relevant to their strategy and will be revisited later.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### New Client Pipeline Workflow

  - [**Problem:** New clients need agentic pipelines quickly but often lack a clear content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Solution:** Duplicate an existing pipeline as a starting point.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Why:** This provides a functional setup for clients to experiment with artifacts and refine their strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Quality Control:** Kirkland will perform a quick sanity check on the duplicated artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [**Why:** To ensure the writing guidelines and prompts are sound, as they significantly impact pipeline output.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Future State:** Daniel's project with Brad will automate workspace setup and pipeline creation, eliminating the need for manual tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Backlog & Internal Project Prioritization

  - [The current backlog is small, creating an opportunity for strategic internal work.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Unassigned Tickets:**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [**Airbyte:** High priority, as the client is in a strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Sunbit:** Low priority, flexible timing.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Discern:** Programmatic client needing a pipeline refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Internal Projects (Lower Priority):**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [**GrowthX Website (Next.js/Sanity):** Defer until client work is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [**Analytics Rollout:** Use surplus bandwidth to help clients adopt the new tool.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
      - [**New Framework Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
          - [**Why:** To replace the old codebase and learn the new framework.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
          - [**Strategy:** Start by migrating simple publishing workflows (e.g., Webflow) that don't require the new router.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [**Newsletter Pipeline Template:** Kirkland will connect with Nathan to review the DataGrid newsletter as a potential model.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

### Loadable Pipeline Innovation

  - [Nico is developing a highly automated pipeline for Loadable.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
    1.  [**Generate Specs:** The agentic pipeline generates hundreds of product specs from articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
    2.  [**Create Templates:** Specs are fed into another pipeline to create templates.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
    3.  [**Human Polish:** A contractor performs final polishing (\~1–1.5 hrs/template).](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [**Proposed GitHub Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Why:** To provide a scalable publishing solution for clients without a CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**How:** An integration creates a PR → GitHub Actions auto-merges after CI passes.](https://fathom.video/share/zjPXAFVsLZ6yLx9bjNyCGDs-s6MYRdzu?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
